= Contents =
  - [[#SSH|SSH]]
      - [[#SSH#authorization|authorization]]
        - [[#SSH#authorization#keygen|keygen]]
        - [[#SSH#authorization#copy key|copy key]]
        - [[#SSH#authorization#force using password|force using password]]
        - [[#SSH#authorization#disabling password auth|disabling password auth]]
        - [[#SSH#authorization#disabling root login|disabling root login]]
        - [[#SSH#authorization#limit login access|limit login access]]
        - [[#SSH#authorization#generate public key from private|generate public key from private]]
        - [[#SSH#authorization#storing keys|storing keys]]

= SSH =

=== authorization ===

==== keygen ====
`ssh-keygen -t rsa -b 4096 -C "your_email@example.com" -f FILE`
`ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -C "your_email@example.com" -f FILE`
==== copy key ====
`ssh-copy-id -i $FILE $user@$host`
==== force using password ====
`ssh -o PreferredAuthentications=password -o PubkeyAuthentication=no $host`
==== disabling password auth ====
`/etc/ssh/sshd_config`
uncomment: `PasswordAuthentication no`
apply: `service ssh restart`
==== disabling root login ====
`/etc/ssh/sshd_config`
uncomment: `PermitRootLogin no`
apply: `service ssh restart`
==== limit login access ====
`/etc/ssh/sshd_config`
add: `AllowUsers user1 user2 ...`
apply: `service ssh restart`
==== generate public key from private ====
`ssh-keygen -y -f ~/.ssh/id_rsa > ~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub` (comment would be lost)
==== storing keys ====
`chmod 700 ~/.ssh`
`chmod 600 ~/.ssh/authorization_keys`
